needs.summary: Platform-wide monthly credit summary: total credits granted this month across all active businesses, plus the month label the screen is scoped to.
needs.filters/actions: scoped to a calendar month (current month by default)

needs.summary: Credit burn aggregated by action type for the month: event counts and credits-per-event for sends, voice parses, and AI insights. Totals, per-type credit sums, and share percentages are derived client-side from events * creditsPerEvent.
needs.filters/actions: grouped by type (sends|voice|insights), scoped to month

needs.summary: Heaviest credit users: per-business rows with plan, monthly grant (with enterprise fair-use flag), credits used, and top-up bundles bought this month against the 2-per-month cap.
needs.filters/actions: filter by plan (all|starter|market|business|wholesale|enterprise); sorted by used desc; month-scoped

needs.summary: Bundle purchase history for the month: each top-up purchase with timestamp, purchasing business, SKU, credits granted, and price in integer kobo. Screen derives total bundle revenue and purchase count from this list.

Credits configuration constants the screen currently hardcodes or reads from fixture comments: bundle cap per business per month (2), per-event credit costs (send 5, voice 1, insight 4), bundle SKU catalog with prices, and per-plan monthly grants. Needed so the dashboard reflects live pricing rather than baked-in constants.
